title: TARDIS Weeping Angels Resource Pack
description: A companion resource pack for the TARDISWeepingAngels plugin
body:
## Custom Item Textures

Contains [Custom Item Textures](https://optifine.net/downloads) (CIT) for the armour worn by skeletons, zombies and pig zombies to transform them into Weeping Angels, Cybermen, Daleks, Empty Children, Sontarans (and Strax), Silurians, Zygons, Vashta Nerada and Ice Warriors. Also has a Custom Entity Model that transforms wolves into K-9.

## Sounds

Contains custom sounds for the Cybermen, Daleks, Sontarans (and Strax), Vashta Nerada, Empty Children and K-9 (and the rest of the Whovian monsters).
